text:
- Vocal/Nonvocal/Both: Admission CHAR 1 A score indicating the patient's ability for expression at admission. Expression includes clear vocal or non-vocal expression of language. This item includes either intelligible speech or clear expression of language using writing or a communication device. The more usual mode of expression ('Vocal' or 'Non-vocal') is evaluated; 'Both' indicates vocal and non-vocal are used about equally. B = Both, N = Nonvocal, V = Vocal
140 _39OD EXPRSN_DSCHRG_CD (39Od)
